channel.title: Lesson learned on My New Hugo Site
channel.description: Recent content in Lesson learned on My New Hugo Site

item.title: Tripped Up With Data Types
item.description: I’ve taken some time this week to get back into solving coding practice problems during some downtime at school. One issue I’ve had with this semester is that there isn’t as much coding built into the course work, so I really have to take it upon myself to find things to code. I was working though Project Euler question 14 where you perform iterative calculations on values up to one million.
